description: Add search/filter on public board, duplicate detection (search-before-submit), bulk approve in admin, and branded empty states with loading personality.
steps: Add search/filter to the public board: In zymarg-community-board/includes/class-zcrb-template.php, add a search bar above the feed grid. The search form should use GET parameter 'zcrb_search' and filter the WP_Query in render_board() using 's' parameter. Add filter dropdown for status (All, In Progress, Fulfilled) using 'zcrb_filter_status'. Style the search bar and filter with the existing design system.

Add duplicate detection / search-before-submit: In the submission form section of render_form(), add a hint that links to the search. In zymarg-community-board/assets/js/zcrb.js, add a live-search feature that triggers when the user types in the message field (debounced 500ms, min 10 chars). Show a 'Similar requests' dropdown below the message textarea that queries an AJAX endpoint. Create the AJAX endpoint in class-zcrb-ajax.php that searches published requests by keyword and returns top 3 matches with title, ref number, and permalink.

Add bulk approve in admin: In zymarg-community-board/includes/class-zcrb-admin.php, register a bulk action 'zcrb_bulk_approve' using the 'bulk_actions-edit-zcrb_request' filter. Handle the bulk action via 'handle_bulk_actions-edit-zcrb_request' filter - loop through selected post IDs, change status from pending to publish. Show admin notice with count of approved requests.

Add branded empty states: In zymarg-community-board/includes/class-zcrb-template.php, replace the plain text '.zcrb-empty' paragraph with a branded empty state component featuring the ZYMARG purple accent, a decorative SVG illustration (simple geometric shapes in brand colors), and personality text. Add a loading skeleton CSS class '.zcrb-skeleton' for future use. Update the bilingual empty-state text in class-zcrb-i18n.php to be more engaging.

Update zymarg-community-board/assets/css/zcrb.css: Add styles for search bar (.zcrb-search), filter (.zcrb-filter), similar requests dropdown (.zcrb-similar), branded empty state (.zcrb-empty-state), and skeleton loader (.zcrb-skeleton).
Update zymarg-community-board/assets/js/zcrb.js: Add the debounced duplicate-detection search functionality.
acceptance_criteria: Search bar appears above the feed and filters results via GET parameter
Status filter dropdown works alongside search
Duplicate detection fires on message textarea input with debounce
Bulk approve action appears in the admin list table bulk actions dropdown
Bulk approve correctly transitions pending posts to published
Empty state shows branded design with personality text
All PHP files pass syntax check
findings: All 7 sub-features implemented successfully: search/filter on public board (GET params zcrb_search + zcrb_filter), duplicate detection AJAX endpoint (zcrb_duplicate_search) with debounced JS, bulk approve admin action, branded empty state with decorative SVG, i18n strings for both en/bn, CSS for search bar + similar results + empty state + skeleton loader, and JS duplicate detection with 500ms debounce. All PHP files pass syntax check. Brand colors (#9500A5, #BD00D1, #FEA9FF) used consistently.
